projectDataListDefaultViewSelector.input: An immutable JSON-safe ordered view-intent array containing only viewName and isDefault.
projectDataListDefaultViewSelector.return: A frozen selectedIndex or null; it never returns caller-owned view objects.
projectDataListDefaultViewSelector.errors: Absent or non-array views produce selectedIndex null without Host fallback.
projectDataListDefaultViewSelector.immutability: The selector does not mutate input and returns a frozen JSON-safe result.

projectDashboardStaticConfiguration.input: An immutable JSON-safe Dashboard static configuration request. It accepts only normalize-dashboard-filters or is-date-like-analytics-field, with scalar filter descriptors or scalar field metadata.
projectDashboardStaticConfiguration.return: A frozen JSON-safe projection containing either the Legacy-equivalent empty static filter list or a deterministic date-like field predicate.
projectDashboardStaticConfiguration.errors: Unsupported host/runtime concerns are absent from this boundary; the versioned corpus has no thrown validation errors.
projectDashboardStaticConfiguration.immutability: The projector does not mutate input and freezes the result and its empty filter array.
projectDashboardStaticConfiguration.hostSideEffects: None. It never receives template/resource objects, generated IDs, runtime expressions, API state, package state, or frontend context.
projectDashboardStaticConfiguration.prohibited: No Dashboard template mutation, control UUID allocation, filter binding, chart rendering, runtime expression execution, resource/package output, or browser behavior.

normalizeHexColor.input: A JSON-serializable value or omitted input. Runtime behavior applies String(value || "").trim().
normalizeHexColor.return: A string containing an uppercase six-digit #RRGGBB value when the trimmed value matches /^#[0-9a-f]{6}$/i; otherwise an empty string.
normalizeHexColor.errors: No thrown error for the versioned JSON-serializable corpus.
normalizeHexColor.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied input value.
normalizeHexColor.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory string normalization only.

defaultValueForFieldType.input: A JSON-serializable value or omitted input. Runtime behavior performs strict equality against the primitive string "Bit" with no coercion, trimming, aliases, or case normalization.
defaultValueForFieldType.return: The string "0" only when the input is exactly the primitive string "Bit"; otherwise an empty string.
defaultValueForFieldType.errors: No thrown error for JSON-serializable values or omitted input.
defaultValueForFieldType.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied input value.
defaultValueForFieldType.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory field-default selection only.

escapeRegExp.input: A JSON-serializable value or omitted input. Runtime behavior applies String(value || "") with no trimming.
escapeRegExp.return: A string that prefixes every occurrence of . * + ? ^ $ { } ( ) | [ ] and backslash with a backslash; all other characters, including whitespace, remain unchanged.
escapeRegExp.errors: No thrown error for JSON-serializable values or omitted input.
escapeRegExp.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied input value.
escapeRegExp.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory regular-expression literal escaping only.

normalizeForLooseFormMatch.input: A JSON-serializable value or omitted input. Runtime behavior applies String(value || "") with no trimming before normalization.
normalizeForLooseFormMatch.return: A lowercase string with every non-ASCII-alphanumeric run replaced by one space, repeated whitespace collapsed, and leading and trailing whitespace removed.
normalizeForLooseFormMatch.errors: No thrown error for JSON-serializable values or omitted input.
normalizeForLooseFormMatch.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied input value.
normalizeForLooseFormMatch.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory loose form-name normalization only.

stripPlanningDocumentSuffix.input: A JSON-serializable value or omitted input. Runtime behavior applies String(value || "") with no pre-trimming.
stripPlanningDocumentSuffix.return: A trimmed string with a terminal, case-insensitive Yeeflow App Plan suffix removed when preceded by whitespace. A whitespace-surrounded hyphen, en dash, or em dash is removed with the suffix; an unsupported delimiter before the required whitespace is retained while the suffix is removed.
stripPlanningDocumentSuffix.errors: No thrown error for JSON-serializable values or omitted input.
stripPlanningDocumentSuffix.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied input value.
stripPlanningDocumentSuffix.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory planning-document title normalization only.

dependencyName.input: A JSON-serializable value or omitted input. Runtime behavior reads name, key, id, and ID in that strict truthy precedence order.
dependencyName.return: The trimmed JavaScript String conversion of the first truthy name, key, id, or ID property; otherwise an empty string.
dependencyName.errors: No thrown error for JSON-serializable values or omitted input.
dependencyName.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied input value or nested values.
dependencyName.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory template dependency-name selection only.

safeDependencyIdentifier.input: A JSON-serializable value or omitted input plus an optional JSON-serializable options value. Runtime behavior reads options.lower directly, so null options throw TypeError while omitted options default to an empty object.
safeDependencyIdentifier.return: A string with each non-ASCII-letter, digit, or underscore run replaced by one underscore and leading or trailing underscores removed. A truthy options.lower lowercases the String(value || "") input first.
safeDependencyIdentifier.errors: Null options throw TypeError because the Legacy helper reads null.lower. No other thrown error occurs for the versioned JSON-serializable corpus.
safeDependencyIdentifier.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied value, options value, or nested values.
safeDependencyIdentifier.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory dependency identifier normalization only.

projectDataListScalarField.input: A ScalarFieldProjectionInput JSON-serializable Data List scalar field specification. It accepts only the pre-ID field boundary and does not accept Legacy resource records, host IDs, mutable templates, generated resources, or runtime state.
projectDataListScalarField.return: A frozen ScalarFieldProjectionResult containing either a frozen ScalarFieldProjection and no findings, or null projection with frozen deferred-boundary findings. The projected DTO contains no ListID, FieldID, generated-resource mutation, or host-owned template object.
projectDataListScalarField.errors: A true allowScan value throws DATA_LIST_BARCODE_SCAN_FIELD_TYPE_INVALID unless the canonical field type is Text and the canonical control type is input. Lookup, sublist, identity, file, and image controls return documented deferred findings rather than a scalar projection.
projectDataListScalarField.immutability: Does not mutate supplied input. The returned result, projection when present, and findings array are runtime-frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectDataListScalarField.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory pre-ID scalar field projection only.
projectDataListScalarField.prohibited: No Legacy field-record shape, ListID, FieldID, generated-resource mutation, template mutation, filesystem, API, environment, network, archive, process, or runtime state is exposed.

projectFixedFilterIntents.input: A FixedFilterIntentInput JSON-serializable fixed-filter specification with an explicit viewScope, field references, filter text, and optional list/view evidence. It accepts no host allocation map or caller-owned findings array.
projectFixedFilterIntents.return: A frozen FixedFilterProjectionResult containing ordered immutable condition intents, deterministic viewScope:fixed-filter:ordinal key requests, and immutable findings. It contains no allocated key.
projectFixedFilterIntents.errors: For a non-empty filter with malformed field references, the current Legacy-equivalent field lookup can throw TypeError. Parseable but unresolved filter text returns DATA_VIEW_FILTER_PLANNED_BUT_NOT_MATERIALIZED as immutable finding data.
projectFixedFilterIntents.immutability: Does not mutate supplied input, fields, or nested values. The result, arrays, child intents, key requests, and findings are runtime-frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectFixedFilterIntents.hostSideEffects: None. The function does not call crypto.randomUUID, allocate keys, mutate findings arrays, access filesystem, API, environment, network, archive, process, or runtime state.
projectFixedFilterIntents.prohibited: Host allocation response validation and caller-owned findings-array append belong only to Local Runtime lowering. This approved distributed Core API is not routed into production behavior.

projectDataListDefaultViewLayout.input: A DataListDefaultViewLayoutProjectionInput containing caller-supplied Data List field records with FieldIDs, an explicit viewScope, optional immutable view intent, optional immutable static template snapshot, and optional list evidence. It accepts no Legacy LayoutView record, ListID, LayoutID, host allocation map, caller-owned findings array, mutable template, generated resource, or runtime state.
projectDataListDefaultViewLayout.return: A frozen DataListDefaultViewLayoutProjectionResult containing a fresh immutable LayoutView fragment with empty filter, immutable FixedFilterProjectionResult intents and deterministic key requests, and immutable findings. FieldIDs are propagated only from caller-supplied field data.
projectDataListDefaultViewLayout.errors: Malformed or omitted field data preserves the observed Legacy TypeError class. Unparseable fixed-filter text returns immutable DATA_VIEW_FILTER_PLANNED_BUT_NOT_MATERIALIZED finding data. FIXED_FILTER_KEY_ALLOCATION_MISSING, FIXED_FILTER_KEY_ALLOCATION_INVALID, and FIXED_FILTER_KEY_ALLOCATION_COLLISION remain Local Runtime-only errors.
projectDataListDefaultViewLayout.immutability: Does not mutate the supplied input, field values, view intent, or template snapshot. The returned result, fragment, nested arrays, intent data, key requests, findings, and nested projection values are runtime-frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectDataListDefaultViewLayout.hostSideEffects: None. The function does not allocate IDs or keys, call crypto.randomUUID, load or mutate templates, mutate generated resources or caller-owned findings arrays, or access filesystem, API, environment, network, archive, process, package, or runtime state.
projectDataListDefaultViewLayout.prohibited: Legacy resource-record lowering, host key allocation validation, Legacy-shaped filter lowering, and optional caller-owned findings append belong only to the separately distributed Local Runtime lowerFixedFilterProjectionAtHost contract. Internal field-selection and normalization helpers remain non-public.

projectDataListAdditionalViewLayout.input: A DataListAdditionalViewLayoutProjectionInput containing supplied FieldIDs, immutable template snapshot, viewIntent.isDefault false, and a non-empty non-default viewScope. It accepts no Legacy LayoutView record, ListID, LayoutID, URL, slug, route key, layout index, host allocation map, caller-owned findings array, mutable template, generated resource, or runtime state.
projectDataListAdditionalViewLayout.return: A frozen DataListAdditionalViewLayoutProjectionResult containing immutable LayoutView fragment data with empty filter, immutable FixedFilterProjectionResult intents and deterministic key requests, and immutable findings.
projectDataListAdditionalViewLayout.errors: Invalid or missing additional intent throws TypeError with DATA_LIST_ADDITIONAL_VIEW_LAYOUT_INTENT_INVALID. Invalid scope throws TypeError with DATA_LIST_ADDITIONAL_VIEW_LAYOUT_SCOPE_INVALID. Malformed field data preserves the observed Legacy TypeError class. Allocation errors remain Local Runtime-only.
projectDataListAdditionalViewLayout.immutability: Does not mutate supplied input, fields, view intent, or template snapshot. Results, nested fragment values, fixed-filter intents, requests, and findings are frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectDataListAdditionalViewLayout.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory non-default Data List LayoutView projection only.
projectDataListAdditionalViewLayout.prohibited: Host key allocation validation, Legacy-shaped filter lowering, optional caller-owned findings append, LayoutID, ListID, URL, route key, layout index, and final resource integration belong outside Materializer Core. Internal normalizers remain non-public.

projectDataListScalarResourceDefinitionI.input: An immutable scalar projection, resource scope, and field ordinal. It accepts no host IDs, allocation maps, lookup resolution, template, mutable resource, or host state.
projectDataListScalarResourceDefinitionI.return: A frozen pre-ID field-record fragment, deterministic FieldID request descriptor, and immutable findings.
projectDataListScalarResourceDefinitionI.errors: Invalid scope, ordinal, or projection throws DATA_LIST_SCALAR_RESOURCE_INTENT_INVALID.
projectDataListScalarResourceDefinitionI.immutability: Inputs are not mutated and returned intent values are frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectDataListScalarResourceDefinitionI.prohibited: No ID allocation, numeric identity conversion, lookup resolution, UUID, template mutation, generated-resource mutation, API, filesystem, environment, process, archive, or package behavior.

projectDataListLookupResolutionIntent.input: An immutable JSON-serializable Data List logical source and field key, ordinal, declared target text, display name, and lookup control type. It accepts no ListID, FieldID, target ListID, target map, template, resource, host context, or runtime state.
projectDataListLookupResolutionIntent.return: A frozen JSON-serializable DataListLookupIntentProjectionResult containing either immutable Lookup intent and deterministic candidate-key request data, or immutable unresolved finding data. No target identity or Legacy Rules payload is returned.
projectDataListLookupResolutionIntent.errors: Invalid intent shape throws DATA_LIST_LOOKUP_INTENT_INVALID. An empty deterministic candidate set returns DATA_LIST_LOOKUP_TARGET_UNRESOLVED as immutable finding data.
projectDataListLookupResolutionIntent.immutability: Does not mutate supplied input. The result, intent, resolution request, candidate keys, findings, and finding objects are runtime-frozen.
projectDataListLookupResolutionIntent.hostSideEffects: None. The function performs deterministic in-memory intent projection only.
projectDataListLookupResolutionIntent.prohibited: No target-map lookup, fallback discovery, ID allocation, numeric identity coercion, Rules lowering, Legacy record shape, template/resource mutation, API, filesystem, environment, network, archive, process, package, or runtime behavior. Internal normalizeKey and unique helpers remain non-public.

projectDataListType1IdentityControlPlace.input: A DataListType1IdentityControlPlacementInput for the Data List surface, view or workbench template kind, immutable template ID and scope descriptors, explicit fields-grid node and control-slot references, lossless string ListID and FieldID values, normalized identity-user-people-person field metadata, and ordinal. It accepts no control ID, mutable template object, host context, allocation map, Legacy control fragment, caller-owned findings array, runtime expression, resource record, or package state.
projectDataListType1IdentityControlPlace.return: A frozen JSON-serializable DataListType1IdentityControlPlacementResult containing either an immutable placement intent with a dynamic-user descriptor and immutable findings, or null intent for excluded non-identity or sublist shapes. The descriptor contains no control ID and is not a host-integrated Legacy fragment.
projectDataListType1IdentityControlPlace.errors: Invalid surface, template kind, ordinal, required descriptor text, or lossless ID input throws DATA_LIST_TYPE1_IDENTITY_CONTROL_PLACEMENT_INVALID. Template-reference errors remain Local Runtime-only.
projectDataListType1IdentityControlPlace.immutability: Does not mutate supplied input, template descriptors, references, or field values. Returned result, intent, descriptor, nested values, and findings are recursively frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectDataListType1IdentityControlPlace.hostSideEffects: None. The function does not load or mutate templates, allocate control IDs, evaluate runtime expressions, mutate resources, append caller findings, access filesystem, API, environment, network, archive, process, package, or runtime state.
projectDataListType1IdentityControlPlace.prohibited: No control ID, mutable template object, host context, allocation map, Legacy control fragment, caller findings array, runtime expression, resource integration, package state, workspace resolution, or internal helper export is exposed. Host lowering belongs only to the separately distributed Local Runtime API.

projectDataListSublistScalarRowSchema.input: An immutable JSON-serializable DataListSublistScalarRowSchemaInput with explicit lossless parent and child ListID/FieldID, row-schema identity, template scope, ordinal, and scalar child-field descriptors only. It accepts no mutable template or resource, allocation map, generated ID, nested control, summary, Lookup, identity, user, department, file, image, binary, barcode, runtime action, expression, or Legacy record shape.
projectDataListSublistScalarRowSchema.return: A frozen JSON-serializable DataListSublistScalarRowSchemaResult containing an ordered immutable intent or null and frozen findings. Every descriptor preserves supplied IDs as strings and contains no generated ID or Legacy-shaped row record.
projectDataListSublistScalarRowSchema.errors: DATA_LIST_SUBLIST_SCALAR_ROW_SCHEMA_INVALID is thrown for malformed Core DTO input. Deferred non-scalar row families return a null intent without allocation, discovery, or fallback.
projectDataListSublistScalarRowSchema.immutability: Does not mutate the input, its child descriptors, or any nested JSON value; the result, intent, descriptors, and findings are frozen.
projectDataListSublistScalarRowSchema.hostSideEffects: None. The function has no filesystem, environment, network, process, API, runtime, template, resource, package, archive, allocation, or caller-array side effect.
projectDataListSublistScalarRowSchema.prohibited: No parent or child allocation map, host ID, mutable template object, mutable resource, row-schema discovery, nested-control lowering, summary, Lookup resolution, runtime action, expression evaluation, Legacy-shaped record, template mutation, or package output is exposed.

projectDataListSublistScalarSummaryInten.input: Accepts only immutable explicit Data List Sublist static summary key/reference, data-list-sublist scope, scalar source-column descriptor, total/average/minimum/maximum/count operation, and deterministic display/format intent. Temporary-variable references and runtime expressions fail closed.
projectDataListSublistScalarSummaryInten.return: Returns frozen JSON-serializable static aggregate intent, descriptor, and finding DTOs with deterministic ordering and no input mutation.
projectDataListSublistScalarSummaryInten.errors: SUBLIST_SUMMARY_REFERENCE_MISSING, SUBLIST_SUMMARY_REFERENCE_INVALID, SUBLIST_SUMMARY_REFERENCE_WRONG_SCOPE, SUBLIST_SUMMARY_REFERENCE_DUPLICATE, SUBLIST_SUMMARY_REFERENCE_RELATIONSHIP_BROKEN, and SUBLIST_TEMP_VARIABLE_REFERENCE_INVALID remain explicit.
projectDataListSublistScalarSummaryInten.immutability: All public DTOs are frozen JSON-safe values. The API exposes no mutable host object or package state.
projectDataListSublistScalarSummaryInten.hostSideEffects: None. The API does not allocate, discover, scope-validate, mutate, bind, write back, or serialize temporary variables.
projectDataListSublistScalarSummaryInten.prohibited: Mutable templates/resources, field records, host context, control IDs, package state, runtime evaluation, temporary-variable lifecycle, Rules/control/template binding, Lookup, identity/binary fields, nested controls, actions, and package output are excluded.

projectDataListSublistDynamicSummaryInte.input: Accepts only an already scope-resolved immutable Data List Sublist dynamic-summary binding descriptor, scalar source-column descriptor, approved aggregate operation, deterministic display intent, and explicit composite scope values. It accepts no host context, inventory, tempVars array, template, resource, field record, package state, control object, or runtime expression.
projectDataListSublistDynamicSummaryInte.return: Returns a frozen JSON-serializable dynamic-summary intent, descriptor, and immutable findings. A valid intent retains the supplied __list_ or __temp_ binding only as a resolved binding descriptor; it contains no temporary-variable inventory or lifecycle authority.
projectDataListSublistDynamicSummaryInte.errors: Invalid resolved scope, summary reference, binding shape, scalar source, operation, or runtime expression returns stable immutable finding data including SUBLIST_DYNAMIC_SUMMARY_SCOPE_INVALID, SUBLIST_DYNAMIC_SUMMARY_BINDING_INVALID, and SUBLIST_DYNAMIC_SUMMARY_RUNTIME_EXPRESSION_FORBIDDEN.
projectDataListSublistDynamicSummaryInte.immutability: The function does not mutate supplied input or nested values. Returned results, intent values, descriptors, bindings, arrays, and findings are recursively frozen and JSON-safe.
projectDataListSublistDynamicSummaryInte.hostSideEffects: None. It does not allocate, discover, scope-validate against an inventory, mutate, bind, write back, serialize, or clean up temporary variables, and it does not evaluate runtime expressions.
projectDataListSublistDynamicSummaryInte.prohibited: No WeakMap or host context, mutable template/resource, field-record identity, control object, package state, Rules/control/template binding, runtime expression evaluation, temporary-variable lifecycle, allocation, discovery, fallback matching, mutation, writeback, cleanup, package output, Lookup, identity/binary fields, nested controls, actions, dashboards, Approval Forms, Document Libraries, or workflows is exposed.

projectDataListSublistNestedControlPlace.input: Accepts only immutable Data List scalar embedded-Sublist placement data: product parent ListID and FieldID, a template snapshot of string slot references, and ordered text/date/number/boolean column descriptors with embedded id and idx semantics. It accepts no mutable template/resource, control ID, host context, allocation map, runtime binding, package state, or child resource identity.
projectDataListSublistNestedControlPlace.return: Returns a frozen JSON-safe placement intent or null with frozen findings. The intent contains only parent product identity, non-product child-control references, ordered column semantics, and control-kind metadata.
projectDataListSublistNestedControlPlace.errors: Invalid snapshot, scope, child reference, duplicate child reference, non-scalar column, or forbidden host-state input returns stable immutable findings including SUBLIST_NESTED_CONTROL_TEMPLATE_SNAPSHOT_INVALID, SUBLIST_NESTED_CONTROL_SCOPE_MISMATCH, and SUBLIST_NESTED_CONTROL_CORE_HOST_STATE_FORBIDDEN.
projectDataListSublistNestedControlPlace.immutability: The input is never mutated. Result, intent, snapshot, scope, placements, columns, controls, and findings are recursively frozen and JSON-safe.
projectDataListSublistNestedControlPlace.hostSideEffects: None. The API does not load or mutate templates, allocate control IDs, insert graph nodes, bind controls, mutate resources, evaluate runtime expressions, or write package output.
projectDataListSublistNestedControlPlace.prohibited: Embedded column id and idx are export semantics only, never child resource identities. Nested Sublist controls, Lookup, identity/user/department, file/image/binary, barcode, actions, template graph mutation, resource integration, package output, dashboards, Approval Forms, Document Libraries, and workflows are excluded.

projectDataListSublistEmbeddedLookupInte.input: Accepts only immutable Data List embedded-Sublist Lookup target/display descriptors: lossless parent scope strings, embedded column id/idx/name semantics, and a direct AppID 41 target ListID/ListSetID with Title display field. It accepts no template, resource, control ID, host context, inventory, runtime state, or addition mapping.
projectDataListSublistEmbeddedLookupInte.return: Returns a frozen JSON-safe immutable Lookup intent and findings. Embedded id and idx remain export-column semantics only; neither is a product resource identity.
projectDataListSublistEmbeddedLookupInte.errors: SUBLIST_EMBEDDED_LOOKUP_SCOPE_MISMATCH, SUBLIST_EMBEDDED_LOOKUP_COLUMN_INVALID, SUBLIST_EMBEDDED_LOOKUP_TARGET_INVALID, and SUBLIST_EMBEDDED_LOOKUP_HOST_STATE_FORBIDDEN are stable fail-closed findings.
projectDataListSublistEmbeddedLookupInte.immutability: Does not mutate input or nested values; all returned DTOs and findings are frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectDataListSublistEmbeddedLookupInte.hostSideEffects: None. The API does not resolve target inventories, execute Lookup, mutate a template/resource, apply addition writeback, enforce runtime read-only state, or write a package.
projectDataListSublistEmbeddedLookupInte.prohibited: No target discovery, allocation, numeric identity coercion, child-resource identity, additional-field transfer, runtime expression, host context, template/resource/package state, action, nested control, identity/binary control, or Approval Form behavior.

projectDataListSublistLookupAdditionalFi.input: Accepts only immutable Data List embedded-Sublist Lookup addition configuration: explicit parent scope, already-resolved Lookup target/display data, one target source field, and one readonly numeric destination column.
projectDataListSublistLookupAdditionalFi.return: Returns frozen JSON-safe static addition configuration intent and findings only.
projectDataListSublistLookupAdditionalFi.errors: Invalid scope, target, source, destination, relationship, or host-state input returns stable immutable findings.
projectDataListSublistLookupAdditionalFi.immutability: Inputs are not mutated. Returned intent and findings are frozen and JSON-serializable.
projectDataListSublistLookupAdditionalFi.hostSideEffects: None. The API performs no target retrieval, event handling, expression evaluation, destination mutation, clearing, readonly enforcement, template/resource mutation, or package output.
projectDataListSublistLookupAdditionalFi.prohibited: Frontend/runtime selection and writeback behavior is out of scope. Embedded id and idx are column semantics, never product resource identities.

projectDataListSublistStaticConfiguratio.input: A JSON-safe tagged Data List planning-only request for parse-row-fields, parse-summaries, normalize-row-type, normalize-control-type, or is-sublist-form-field. It accepts no field record, control, template, resource, package, host context, target inventory, runtime state, or caller-owned array.
projectDataListSublistStaticConfiguratio.return: A frozen JSON-safe tagged projection containing only the corresponding normalized static value. Parsed Lookup target and addition values preserve lossless strings; embedded id and idx remain column/export semantics only.
projectDataListSublistStaticConfiguratio.errors: DATA_LIST_SUBLIST_STATIC_CONFIGURATION_SCOPE_INVALID and DATA_LIST_SUBLIST_STATIC_CONFIGURATION_KIND_INVALID fail closed for an invalid tagged request. Legacy malformed row and summary cells retain their observed empty-result behavior.
projectDataListSublistStaticConfiguratio.immutability: The input is not mutated. The projection and every nested returned JSON value are recursively frozen and serializable.
projectDataListSublistStaticConfiguratio.hostSideEffects: None. The API performs planning-only string parsing and normalization in memory.
projectDataListSublistStaticConfiguratio.prohibited: No template/resource/package mutation, target-map resolution, runtime Lookup execution, additional-field writeback, temporary-variable lifecycle, control ID allocation, host context, child-resource identity, frontend behavior, Approval Form routing, or Phase 9-16 specialist lowering is exposed.

internalHelperExposure: No internal materializer helper is part of the public runtime export surface.

projectApprovalFormSubListLookupStaticCo.input: A JSON-safe Approval Form embedded-Sublist row-field Lookup configuration boundary. It accepts only type discriminators and static AppID/ListID/ListSetID/display-field candidates; it accepts no Data List DTO, target inventory, template, resource, control, host context, package state, or runtime event.
projectApprovalFormSubListLookupStaticCo.return: A frozen ApprovalFormSubListLookupStaticConfiguration with appId 41 and lossless string listId, listSetId, and listField, or null for a non-Lookup/no-configuration shape.
projectApprovalFormSubListLookupStaticCo.errors: APPROVAL_FORM_SUBLIST_LOOKUP_CONFIGURATION_INVALID is thrown with the exact Legacy failure behavior for non-string supplied values, partial configuration, invalid AppID, malformed identifiers, or missing display field.
projectApprovalFormSubListLookupStaticCo.immutability: The input is never mutated. A non-null result is frozen and JSON-serializable; its 19-digit IDs remain strings.
projectApprovalFormSubListLookupStaticCo.hostSideEffects: None. The API does not retrieve Lookup targets, execute selection events, assign or clear values, evaluate expressions, mutate templates/resources/packages, or enforce frontend runtime behavior.
projectApprovalFormSubListLookupStaticCo.prohibited: Data List DTOs, Lookup target resolution, Local Runtime APIs, frontend selection, target retrieval, automatic assignment, clearing, runtime writeback, readonly timing, host context, control identity, mutable template/resource/package state, and helper exports are excluded.

projectTemplateStaticNormalization.input: A JSON-safe tagged request for only layout-purpose matching, caller-supplied approved template-ID extraction, static action classification, residue detection, detail-layout action classification, or default layout-attribute projection. It accepts no template loader, mutable graph, resource, package, runtime state, or host callback.
projectTemplateStaticNormalization.return: A recursively frozen JSON-safe tagged projection containing only a boolean, string, or fresh default attribute DTO.
projectTemplateStaticNormalization.errors: An unsupported tag throws Unsupported template static normalization kind. Empty and malformed JSON snapshots retain the relevant Legacy false or empty-string result.
projectTemplateStaticNormalization.immutability: Neither input nor caller-owned approved-ID array is mutated. The result and every nested DTO value are frozen and serializable.
projectTemplateStaticNormalization.hostSideEffects: None. The API performs deterministic in-memory snapshot classification only.
projectTemplateStaticNormalization.prohibited: No template loading, control insertion, dependency/page/position mutation, child-array mutation, resource/package mutation, generated ID, browser/frontend, runtime action execution, or host orchestration is exposed.

projectApprovalFormStaticConfiguration.input: A JSON-safe tagged Approval Form static configuration request for explicit-default classification, public step normalization, full-row classification, immutable field-spec deduplication, public field selection, no-fields presentation, or a normalized scalar embedded-Sublist row control type. It accepts no Data List DTO, template/resource/page variable object, generated ID seed, workflow state, runtime expression, Lookup target inventory, or package state.
projectApprovalFormStaticConfiguration.return: A recursively frozen tagged JSON-safe result containing only the legacy-compatible static value. Lossless IDs in static list-reference metadata remain strings.
projectApprovalFormStaticConfiguration.errors: An unsupported kind throws Unsupported Approval Form static configuration kind. A no-fields presentation request without a host-supplied deterministic id fails closed.
projectApprovalFormStaticConfiguration.immutability: The input is not mutated. The result and every nested output value are recursively frozen and serializable.
projectApprovalFormStaticConfiguration.hostSideEffects: None. Host code retains template/resource/page-variable mutation and deterministic ID generation.
projectApprovalFormStaticConfiguration.prohibited: No Approval Form Lookup target retrieval, frontend selection, automatic writeback, runtime expression, Job Position resolution, task/workflow execution, layout insertion/removal, package output, or helper export is exposed.
